===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan - Trainload of Fools_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - "Trainload Of Fools" Nrnberg, Germany July 1st 1978 (Factory Pressed Discs) JTT

BOB DYLAN
"Trainload Of Fools"
Zeppelinfeld
Nrnberg, Germany
July 1st 1978

RATTLESNAKE: RS 085/086 (2001)

SOURCE: Factory Pressed Discs > EAC > Flac Level 8 Align on Sector Boundaries

300dpi Scans of all Artwork included

JTT, May 2011

Disc One
01. SHE'S LOVE CRAZY
02. BABY STOP CRYING
03. MR. TAMBOURINE MAN
04. SHELTER FROM THE STORM
05. IT'S ALL OVER NOW, BABY BLUE
06. TANGLED UP IN BLUE
07. BALLAD OF A THIN MAN
08. MAGGIE'S FARM
09. I DON'T BELIEVE YOU
10. LIKE A ROLLING STONE
11. I SHALL BE RELEASED
12. GOING, GOING, GONE
13. A CHANGE IS GONNA COME
14. LOVE MINUS ZERO/NO LIMIT
15. LAISSEZ FAIRE

Disc Two
01. A HARD RAIN'S A-GONNA FALL
02. ONE OF US MUST KNOW (SOONER OR LATER)
03. YOU'RE A BIG GIRL NOW
04. ONE MORE CUP OF COFFEE (VALLEY BELOW)
05. BLOWIN' IN THE WIND
06. I WANT YOU
07. SENOR (TALES OF YANKEE POWER)
08. MASTERS OF WAR
09. JUST LIKE A WOMAN
10. DON'T THINK TWICE, IT'S ALL RIGHT
11. ALL ALONG THE WATCHTOWER
12. ALL I REALLY WANT TO DO
13. IT'S ALRIGHT, MA (I'M ONLY BLEEDING)
14. FOREVER YOUNG
15. I'LL BE YOUR BABY TONIGHT
16. THE TIMES THEY ARE A-CHANGIN'

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO LOSSY FILES AND UPLOAD LINKS ON EXPECTING RAIN OR OTHER SITES
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
